text: My chest is feeling slightly tight, which means I am definitely having a heart attack. I feel so terrified, so it must be true.
I made a typo in the email to the boss, I am going to get fired and lose my house. I feel so ashamed, it proves I am incompetent.
I have a headache, it is probably a brain tumor. I feel this deep sense of dread, so I just know something terrible is happening to me.
The stock market dipped today, my retirement is ruined. I feel so panicked, I must be completely destitute now.
My partner hasn't texted back in 2 hours, they have definitely been in a fatal car crash. My anxiety is peaking, so I know I am right.
I failed this one quiz, I am going to fail out of college and my life is over. I feel utterly hopeless, which means there is no future for me.
My throat is sore, I definitely have a terminal illness. The fear in my chest tells me that my life is effectively over.
I stumbled during my presentation, the entire department thinks I am a joke and I will never get promoted. I feel so humiliated, I must be a failure.
My flight is delayed by 30 minutes, I am going to miss my connection and be stranded forever. I feel so angry and trapped, this situation is completely impossible.
I accidentally scratched the rental car, they are going to sue me for everything I have. I feel so incredibly guilty, I must be a terrible person.
The dog threw up, he is definitely dying and it is going to cost me thousands of dollars. I feel so overwhelmed, this is the end of the world.
I got a C on my paper, I am destined to be a complete failure in life. I feel like a loser, so I must actually be one.
My boss asked to see me, I am getting fired today. I feel sick to my stomach, so I know I am in huge trouble.
I forgot to pay the electricity bill, they are going to shut off my power and I will freeze to death. I feel so stupid, this disaster is all my fault.
I feel so unlovable right now, which means I will die alone and nobody will ever care about me. This feeling is proof of my bleak future.
I should have known better than to trust him, it is entirely my fault he lied to me.
I must always be perfectly happy for my kids, and if they are crying, it is because I am a terrible mother.
I ought to be making more money by this age, my parents are disappointed in me and it is all my own doing.
I should never make a mistake at work, and the fact that the project is delayed is 100% on my shoulders.
I have to be the one to fix my sister's marriage, if they get divorced it is because I didn't intervene enough.
I should be working out every single day, the fact that my partner seems distant is definitely because I am letting myself go.
I must always have a spotless house, when guests look uncomfortable it is clearly because they see my failure.
I should have predicted that the market would crash, my family's financial struggle is entirely my fault.
I ought to be more outgoing, the party was boring because I didn't entertain people properly.
I must be the perfect friend at all times, if she is having a bad day, I clearly didn't support her enough.
I should never feel angry, the argument we had was completely my fault because of my terrible temper.
I have to succeed in this business, if it fails, it means I am personally defective.
I should be able to handle everything on my own, asking for help means I am a burden to everyone around me.
I must always eat perfectly healthy, if my dog gets sick it is probably because I fed him a bad scrap and I am awful.
I ought to have a better relationship with my boss, the team's low morale is entirely due to my lack of leadership.
I didn't get the job offer, so I am a complete failure and I will never ever get hired by anyone.
He canceled our first date, people are always completely unreliable and I am destined to be alone forever.
I ruined dinner, I am a totally worthless cook and every meal I make turns out to be a disaster.
I got rejected from that publisher, my writing is complete garbage and no one will ever read my books.
My friend forgot to text me back, she is entirely selfish and everybody always ignores me.
I missed a day of studying, my entire week is ruined and I always give up on my goals.
I had a panic attack at the store, I am completely broken and I will never be able to live a normal life.
My car broke down again, this car is a total piece of junk and nothing good ever happens to me.
I made a fool of myself at the party, I am a total social outcast and people will always hate me.
I couldn't lift the weight at the gym, I am completely weak and I will never get stronger no matter what.
I slipped off my diet today, all my progress is totally destroyed and I will always be overweight.
My boss criticized my code, I am an entirely incompetent developer and every project I touch fails.
I argued with my wife, our marriage is a complete sham and we are always fighting.
I lost  in the stock market today, investing is a total scam and I always lose money.
The movie was slightly boring, it was a complete waste of time and all modern cinema is terrible.
The teacher praised my essay but marked one spelling error; she must think I am an idiot.
I had a great date but he looked at his watch once, he definitely thinks I am boring and wants to leave.
The team celebrated the launch, but I noticed a tiny bug in the UI, everyone is going to think the whole product is garbage.
My performance review was 99% positive but mentioned I could speak up more, my boss is clearly trying to find a reason to fire me.
I had a fun vacation, but it rained for one hour on Tuesday, my friends are going to think the whole trip was ruined.
The audience clapped, but one person was looking at their phone, they all secretly hated my speech.
I got 9 out of 10 questions right, but I missed the last one, the professor definitely thinks I am a fraud.
My wife said she loved the gift but asked for the receipt just in case, she obviously hates it and thinks I have terrible taste.
We had a great quarter, but one client churned, the CEO is definitely going to shut down our department.
I lost 10 pounds, but I gained 1 pound this week, everyone at the gym is definitely judging me for getting fatter.
The party was packed, but my crush didn't show up, everybody must think I throw terrible parties.
I got a promotion, but the pay raise was slightly less than I wanted, they clearly don't value me at all.
I painted a beautiful landscape, but the cloud looks weird, art critics would definitely laugh at this.
My dog is usually so well-behaved, but he barked at the mailman today, the neighbors definitely think he is dangerous.
I cooked a massive feast, but the rolls were slightly burnt, my guests are going to go home and tell everyone I am a terrible host.
I felt a random twinge in my leg, it is definitely a blood clot and I am going to die tonight. I feel absolutely terrified, so it must be true.
My code has a bug, the entire production database is going to be wiped. I feel so guilty, I must be a terrible engineer.
I lost my keys, I will never be able to get into my house again and will be homeless. I feel despair, so this is my new reality.
The teacher sighed while grading my test, I failed and I am going to get kicked out of school. I feel so ashamed, I know I failed.
I forgot to feed the cat this morning, he is going to starve to death before I get home. I feel awful, so I am a completely abusive pet owner.
I should have remembered her birthday, the fact she is crying is completely my fault and I am a horrible person.
I must always be the strongest person in the room, if my team fails it is because I didn't carry them enough.
I ought to be married by now, my parents' embarrassment is 100% because I am unlovable.
I should never show weakness, my friend's panic attack happened because I wasn't a solid enough rock for them.
I have to make everyone happy, the tension at dinner is entirely my fault for not making a better joke.
I didn't get an A on the test, I am a complete failure and I will never succeed at anything academically.
My boyfriend and I argued, our relationship is a total nightmare and we are always fighting about everything.
I missed a single shot in the game, I am entirely useless and I always drag the whole team down.
I burned the toast, I am a completely hopeless adult and I will always ruin every meal I make.
One person disagreed with my post, everyone on the internet hates me and I am always completely wrong.
The concert was amazing, but I hit one wrong note, the entire audience thinks I am a terrible musician.
My boss gave me a glowing review, but said I could improve my punctuality, he is definitely planning to fire me.
We had a great family dinner, but my dad frowned once, he definitely thinks my life choices are a mistake.
I won the award, but the presenter mispronounced my name, they clearly think I am completely irrelevant.
The house is perfectly clean, but there is one spot on the mirror, my guests are going to think I am a total slob.
